easy.title: Word Length Map
easy.description: Given list of words, return dict mapping `word: len(word)` using dict comprehension.
easy.solution:
def word_lengths(words):
    return {w: len(w) for w in words}
hints: Use {w: len(w) for w in words}

medium.title: Filter Passing Grades
medium.description: Given dict `{'Alice': 85, 'Bob': 45}`, return dict of students with score >= 50.
medium.solution:
def filter_passing(scores):
    return {k: v for k, v in scores.items() if v >= 50}

hard.title: Count Character Occurrences
hard.description: Build frequency dict for string using set and count in dict comprehension.
hard.solution:
def char_freq_comp(s):
    return {c: s.count(c) for c in set(s)}
hints: Iterate set(s) to avoid redundant counts

debugging.title: Fix Missing Colon Syntax
debugging.buggyCode: d = {x, x**2 for x in range(3)}
debugging.fixedCode: d = {x: x**2 for x in range(3)}
bugs: Comma used instead of colon `:` between key and value.
